stage.headline: GROHE Ceramics: Basics
stage.subline: Made to match in form & function

children.textComponent:
Clay and other materials from the ground have been used for pottery and in households since the earliest ages.

Since they are being natural materials, they include different metals and minerals which can have an impact on the quality and production processes in the industry.

Due to the "nature" of the raw material, ceramic products are all unique and no product is identical to another.

In the tiles below you will find specific chapters for all interests, you can jump directly there.  We recommend starting with the "Features and Benefits". 

Gain a certificate by taking a short quiz at the end of the training.

Complete solutions for every customer

GROHE Ceramics enhance any modern bathroom with their timeless design, hygiene and durability. GROHE offers a complete solution for end consumers, installers, and project clients, merging design, function, and innovation.

 

Understand customer needs

To confidently recommend the right GROHE Ceramic products, it’s essential to first understand the customer’s daily habits, space, and style preferences. Use the following guiding questions to uncover what truly matters to them — and to match their needs with the perfect GROHE solution

rows: Who will be using this bathroom – adults, children, or guests?
How do you plan to use the washbasin – just for handwashing or also for rinsing clothes?
Any specific design or appearance you would like?
Do you prefer compact or wider basin with more surface space?
Preferred basin shape? Rectangular, oval, or round?
Preferred installation type? Countertop, built-in, pedestal, wall-mounted?
Do you already have a vanity or cabinet?
Will you change the faucet or keep the current one?
Are you looking for a Performance, Premium or Premium Luxury solution?
Who will be using this toilet? - Private or guest use? Any special needs? (disability?)
Are you interested in WCs with new technology for hygiene & self cleaning?
Do you prefer a wall-hung or floor-standing toilet?
Do you need a compact or standard-size toilet?
Do you prefer a visible or concealed cistern?
Do you already have a flushing system or plan to install a new one?
Do you have any space or installation constraints?
How important is easy cleaning for you?
Are you familiar with rimless toilets and their hygiene benefits?
Are you looking for a Performance, Premium or Premium Luxury solution?
Are you looking for an affordable or premium solution?

stage.headline: Production Process
stage.subline: The complexity of the production process described in eight steps

children.textComponent: Depending on product lines or specific requirements, ceramic products can be produced from different mixtures of clay with varying ingredients such as minerals, quartz, feldspar and others. Although the different ingredients have an impact on the properties of each product, the production process for the different clays is the same and the output is of high quality as it can be expected by a GROHE customer.

Every ceramic is created from one plaster mould to create the specific shapes of our wasbasins or WCs. 
Every used mould, is only used once and is a copy from a "master mould".
The liquid ceramic raw material (liquid clay) is poured into the plaster mould, where the plaster removes the moisture from this viscous mass.
At this stage, the material is still soft and can be damaged quickly. Therfore producing creamics requires skilled and experienced craftsman.

As the material is extremely sensitive to external influences, the products must be dried in a climate-controlled environment with controlled temperature, humidity and wind speed to prevent cracking in the material. Sanitary ceramic can lose up to 3 % of its original size during drying.

The glaze is applied before firing. It provides the typical shine that can be seen and felt after firing, also the feature HyperClean is added at this stage here. Depending on the shape of the product, the glaze is sprayed onto the surface by hand or by machine.
The glazed sanitary ceramic is now fired to harden it and make it break-proof, as unfired ceramic is unusable. During the firing process, the sanitary ceramic loses a further 10 % of its size.

There are at least three different inspections:

  • A visual inspection to check the surface of the product
  • Measurement of the dimensions and gradient
  • A leakage test with water or air

Once all tests have been passed, the coating (including the feature PureGuard) is applied to make the surface easy to clean. This coating prevents limescale or dirt from being deposited on the surface.

stage.headline: Product Range
stage.subline: Learn more about the GROHE ceramic lines …

children.textComponent:
The following Ceramic lines are available. Each of those product lines is displayed in more detailed below. 
Including: inspirational images, description text and product range overview.

With an edge thickness of only 5 mm and our advanced GROHE PureGuard hygiene surface technology for easy cleaning, the new GROHE Airio ceramic vessel basins transform every bathroom into a recreation zone of sophisticated style and visual delight.

The basins are equipped with a ceramic waste in the same slim design to enhance the overall look. The new GROHE Airio vessel basins are a true masterpiece of material art. 

Perfect Match: Allure, Atrio & Atrio Prviate Collection.
Crafted with care to make GROHE’s passion for water tangible in every detail.

The new Essence range has everything required to create a clearly elegant modern bathroom scheme. All featuring the same subtle, organic lines as the Essence bathtubs and therefore creating a harmonious scheme is simple.

Perfect Match: Essence & Lineare.
The collection includes three sizes of vanity basins, vessel basins plus practical wall-hung options. In addition, three different types of Essence bathtubs are offered.

Designed to exceed expectations In terms of aesthetics, performance and hygiene! The enhanced Euro Ceramic is the next evolutionary step for our successful ceramic collection and sets new standards for contemporary bathroom schemes.

Perfect Match: Cubeo & Eurosmart.
Different to most wall hung toilets the new GROHE Euro WC is easily accessible for fixation via the top through the mountains holes of the WC seat. This is a specific benefit for the installer.

Designed to match for creating your personal retreat! Mix our Euro Ceramic products with one of our fitting tap collections – Eurosmart, Eurosmart Cosmopolitan or the new Cubeo – for a seamless bathroom look.

The Cube Ceramic range of basin and WC designs has been created to suit your personal style and routine, but are also united by crisp profiles and clean corners for an effortlessly contemporary look.

Perfect Match: EuroCube & Lineare.

With its strong, minimalist lines, the stunning Cube Ceramic collection sums up cool and contemporary bathroom luxury.

With ceramics from the Cube Ceramic range, you create a bathroom scheme that makes the best out of effortless chic and contemporary design. Generously proportioned, its distinctive basins turn your bathroom into a welcoming urban oasis.

A bathroom that appeals to everyone: its sleek forms make Bau Ceramic the ideal collection for residential and public buildings. 

Perfect Match: BauEdge & BauLoop.

Every project needs a versatile design line that fits harmoniously into each bathroom interiors. With its soft and round forms, Bau Ceramic is the perfect choice for the bathroom interiors. Its contemporary style makes it the perfect solution for your project, suiting every taste.

Simplicity of design and accessible, unfussy styling make GROHE BauEdge ceramics ideal for modern bathrooms. Easy to harmonise with GROHE Bauline and Eurosmart faucets and accessories, the range offers long-lasting appeal and is the perfect place to start your revamped bathroom look.

Perfect Match: BauEdge & BauLoop.

Purity of design is what makes BauEdge special. The range of washbasins and WCs has been created to complement a range of modern bathroom styles and will give dependable service for many years. It’s easy to co-ordinate with Baulines and Eurosmart faucets, and all WCs benefit from rimless technology for peerless hygiene and easy maintenance.

Design that suits your style

Enjoy the feeling of lightness and wellbeing that a personalised cleaning routine can bring you. Sensia Arena impresses with advanced hygiene and comfort. The powerful Triple Vortex flush and the AquaCeramic coating for instance keep the toilet bowl clean, while the nightlight guides your way in the dark.

Upgrade your hygiene routine

Elevate your bathroom with GROHE Sensia Pro, where hygiene innovation meets design. Enjoy its exceptional features: the powerful Triple Vortex flush ensures silent yet thorough cleansing, while the Twin Shower Arm upgrades your perfect hygiene routine. With Auto Open Close, your bathroom experience becomes incredibly convenient. And after the warm water cleanse, our gentle dryer ensures a comfortable finish.

stage.headline: Features and Benefits
stage.subline: Learn more about ceramics an the benefits they offer…

children.textComponent: Dirt and Germ resistant finish
Preventing 99.9% of bacterial growth.
Three water outlets: Clean and silent
No chance for dirt and bacteria to hide
Fast removal for easy cleaning
Gentle and quiet

• Dirt- and germ-resistant finish → Less chances for bacteria and dirt
  • Keeps your ceramics clean and sparkling white.
  • Anti-bacterial ions prevent bacteria growth.
  • The smooth surface locks out dirt resulting from limescale and grime.
  • Effortless to clean.

• Antibacterial silver ions in the ceramic protect the surface from dirt & germs.
  • Preventing 99.9% of bacterial growth.
  • Ceramic remains clean and hygienic.

Silver ions are locked in the ceramic as part of the firing process which deactivate enzymes, preventing 99% of all bacterial growth.

• Powerful but quiet vortex of water that swirls from three outlets to create a powerful suction that leaves nothing behind.
  • Every corner of the bowl is covered and cleaned.
  • Effective system is unlikely to splash.
  • Sustainable: Low water consumption, with a dual flush option 4.5l & 3l.

• A “rimless” bowl means every surface is easy to reach and effortless to clean.
  • Bacteria hiding in corners and crevices are a thing of the past.

• A special hinge that allows for easy removal of the toilet seat and lid.
  • Makes hidden spaces easily accessible for cleaning to keep the WC a hygienic and germ-free place.
  • Standard for all seats in all lines.

• Both seat and lid have a gentle and quiet soft-closing mechanism to add a little more comfort.
  • Ensures no slamming noises and no risk of children trapping their fingers.
  • User-friendly, durable and reliable.

interactions.title: Match the unique benefits of GROHE Ceramics with the correct descriptions.

quizMetaInformation.headline: Knowledge Check
quizMetaInformation.text: This quiz consists of 9 questions. You need 8 correct answers to pass the quiz. Click the play button to start.

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: You have successfully completed the quiz! Very well done, you really know your stuff. Go ahead and download your earned certificate in your personal space section. You can revisit the web-based training module at any time or repeat the quiz to refresh your knowledge.

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: Unfortunately, not everything was quite right. Do you want to repeat the quiz or go back to the training module to review the content one more time?

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: Correct! PureGuard, Soft close and Rimless are the right ones from this list.

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: This is not correct! PureGuard, Soft close and Rimless would have been the right ones from this list.

interactions.title: Cermaics Basics: Which feature differentiates the new Euro Ceramic from other ceramic product lines?

interactionMetaInformation.headline: Which feature differentiates the new Euro Ceramic from other ceramic product lines?

interactionBuilder.question: Which feature differentiates the new Euro Ceramic from other ceramic product lines?
interactionBuilder.questionInstruction: Please select the correct answer and confirm by clicking OK.

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: Yes, HyperClean is correct! HyperClean describes the use of silver ions in the ceramic which result in a significant reduction of bacteria on the surface. PureGuard is the coating which is used in other ceramic lines.

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: No, HyperClean is correct! HyperClean describes the use of silver ions in the ceramic which result in a significant reduction of bacteria on the surface. PureGuard is the coating which is used in other ceramic lines.

interactions.title: Ceramics: Basics - Which statement describes GROHE Cube ceramics?

interactionMetaInformation.headline: Which statement describes GROHE Cube ceramics?

interactionBuilder.question: Which statement describes GROHE Cube ceramics?
interactionBuilder.questionInstruction: Please select the correct answer and confirm by clicking OK.

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: Correct! Cube is best described with the strong minimalistic lines. Essence: Subtle organic. Euro: designed to exceed expectations and BauEdge: Purity of design.

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: This one was tough! Cube is best described with the strong minimalistic lines. Essence: Subtle organic. Euro: designed to exceed expectations and BauEdge: Purity of design.

interactions.title: Ceramics: Basics - What is the advantage of a rimless WC?

interactionMetaInformation.headline: What is the advantage of a rimless WC?

interactionBuilder.question: What are the advantages of a rimless WC?
interactionBuilder.questionInstruction: Please select the correct answers and confirm by clicking OK.

choiceAnswerOptions.answerText: No place for dirt and bacteria to hide

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: Yes! In fact a rimless bowl is easy to clean as there is no closed rim and therefore no place for dirt or bacteria to hide.

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: Not correct! In fact a rimless bowl is easy to clean as there is no closed rim and therefore no place for dirt or bacteria to hide.

interactionBuilder.question: How thick are the edges of the Airio ceramic vessel basins?

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: Correct, the edges are only 5 mm thick!

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: No, because the edges are 5 mm thick.

interactions.title: Ceramics: Basics - Which effect does the PureGuard have?

interactionMetaInformation.headline: Which effect does the PureGuard have?

interactionBuilder.question: Which effect does the PureGuard have?
interactionBuilder.questionInstruction: Please select the correct answers and confirm by clicking OK.

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: Very good! The smooth surface locks out dirt, keeps the ceramics clean and is also effortless to clean.

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: Oh no! Due to PureGuard the smooth surface locks out dirt, keeps the ceramics clean and is also effortless to clean.

interactions.title: Ceramics: Basics - Which are specific characteristics of all ceramics?

interactionMetaInformation.headline: Which are specific characteristics of all ceramics?

interactionBuilder.question: Which are specific characteristics of all ceramics?
interactionBuilder.questionInstruction: Please select the correct answers and confirm by clicking OK.

choiceAnswerOptions.answerText: Due to standardized production all products are identical

positiveFeedback.feedbackText: Yes, correct! All ceramics are made from natural materials and include metals and minerals. Due to the nature of the materials and the production process all products are unique.

negativeFeedback.feedbackText: Not correct! All ceramics are made from natural materials and include metals and minerals. Due to the nature of the materials and the production process all products are unique.
